meta.title: RAG Multimodal — High-Level Runtime
meta.subtitle: Primary query path, local trust boundary, and managed external dependencies

cards.title: Primary request path
items: The browser submits a question to Next.js, which calls FastAPI at the configured API base URL
FastAPI runs the blocking query in a worker thread and passes bounded chat history to the RAG pipeline
The pipeline returns only the generated answer and the source metadata selected for the response

cards.title: Data and ingestion
items: Uploads are streamed, sanitized, SHA-256 identified, signature-validated, and stored under .tmp/uploads
Media extraction normalizes TXT, Markdown, DOCX, PDF, image, audio, and video inputs into indexable items
Gemini creates embeddings; Pinecone stores vectors in the configured namespace; SQLite tracks files, chunks, and feedback
CLI tools call ingestion/query services directly and are an operational entry point, not a separate network tier

cards.title: Trust boundaries
items: The local boundary contains the browser-facing UI, FastAPI, synchronous service workers, SQLite, and local files
Gemini and Pinecone are external managed services reached through API keys and bounded provider adapters
Retrieved document content is treated as data; generation is instructed not to follow document-embedded instructions
Admin-only delete and clear operations require X-Admin-Token when configured
